steps.action: POST /v1/chat/completions with stream:true and simple prompt
steps.expected: Text content appears in SSE delta.content fields
steps.observed: Text content appeared correctly: 'Hello', ' world', ',', ' friend' streamed as separate SSE events

steps.action: POST /v1/chat/completions with stream:true and reasoning-requiring prompt
steps.expected: Thinking appears in SSE as reasoning_content field
steps.observed: reasoning_content field present in SSE events with step-by-step reasoning text

evidence.sampleContent: reasoning_content contained: '**Explaining reasoning steps**\n\nI need to provide step-by-step reasoning...'

assertions.title: Tool calls are extracted and formatted

steps.action: POST /v1/chat/completions with stream:true and file-query prompt
steps.expected: Tool calls appear in SSE as tool_calls array with name and arguments
steps.observed: tool_calls array present with function name 'shell' and arguments JSON containing command details

evidence.sampleContent: tool_calls contained: {index:0, id:'call_...', type:'function', function:{name:'shell', arguments:'{\"command\":\"ls -la\"...}'}}

steps.observed: All tested streams ended with 'data: [DONE]' message

evidence.networkTrace: All streaming responses terminated with data: [DONE]

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-STREAM-002 through VAL-STREAM-005): All passed. SSE streaming format correctly preserves text content in delta.content, thinking content in reasoning_content field, tool calls in tool_calls array, and streams properly terminate with data: [DONE].
